docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTIONS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT GUOCAI ZENG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ZIZHE REN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT CLAIM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT GUOCAI ZENG DID NOT APPEAR THEREFORE RENDERING HIS MATTER DISMISSED. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ZIZHE REN REUESTED HIS CROSS COMPLAINT BE DISMISSED AS WELL FOR NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
